# setAndCommit

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for setAndCommit

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useSetAndCommitMutation(); mutate({ input: '<SetAndCommitInput>' });
```

## Examples

### Use useSetAndCommitMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useSetAndCommitMutation();
mutate({ input: '<SetAndCommitInput>' });
```
